data.title: Volta Finance Limited reports Net Asset Value as at 30 June 2025 for VTA / VTAS, monthly report released.
data.description: The monthly report for Volta Finance Limited (VTA / VTAS) for June 2025 has been published. Please note that the report is not for release, distribution, or publication, in whole or part, in or into the United States.
LECTRA: Q2 & H1 2025 financial report released with key metrics.

data.title: Inventor from Laporte, Texas creates new Door Hinge Pin Remover, eliminates need for small screwdriver.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an inventor from Laporte, Texas discussed the creation of a new accessory aimed at simplifying the process of removing pins from door hinges. The inventor stated that the innovation, known as the DOOR HINGE PIN REMOVER, was developed to eliminate the requirement of using a small screwdriver for this task. This new invention introduces a more efficient method for tackling the issue, with the goal of making the process quicker and easier for users.

data.title: Inventor from Portland, Texas creates Mud Wrench lug wrench (CTK-8158) to help motorists; boosts traction.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Portland, Texas introduced the MUD WRENCH, a tool aimed at helping motorists quickly free their vehicles from mud or sand ruts. The lug wrench design offers enhanced traction and assistance. This innovation is intended to address the challenges faced by drivers in such situations, potentially reducing the time and effort required to get vehicles unstuck. The inventor highlighted the practicality and effectiveness of the MUD WRENCH in aiding motorists in coping with these common road obstacles. This product is slated to be a game-changer, with its unique features and benefits catering to drivers dealing with challenging terrains.

data.title: DKBinnovative appoints Peter Bertran as Chief Client Officer with over a decade of IT leadership experience.
data.description: In Frisco, Texas, on July 24, 2025, a prominent managed IT and cybersecurity company, DKBinnovative, has appointed Peter Bertran as their new Chief Client Officer (CCO). Bertran brings more than 10 years of experience in leading IT operations, service delivery, and infrastructure management.

data.title: 45 young women in Illinois prepare for ComEd's EV Rally, building electric vehicles and gaining STEM education with female mentors.
data.description: In Chicago, 45 young women are preparing for the upcoming third EV Rally by ComEd. The initiative aims to educate female students about electric vehicles (EVs), as well as science, technology, engineering, and math (STEM) concepts, and the clean energy sector. Through this program, participants interact with female mentors from ComEd. During four build nights, they collaborate with their mentors to construct electric go-carts. This hands-on experience not only includes assembling the vehicles but also covers learning STEM principles and engaging in related challenges. The program is focused on achieving high speeds and fostering a strong connection between the young women and their mentors.

data.title: In H1 2025, Lectra saw stable revenues and modest decline in EBITDA despite higher volatility in Q2.
data.description: During the first half of 2025, the company experienced consistent revenues with a slight decrease in EBITDA. The period saw heightened volatility, particularly in the second quarter. Overall, the company maintained stability with revenue streams and managed to limit the decline in EBITDA amidst market fluctuations.

data.title: Fresh sweet cherries are recommended for healthy snacking during back-to-school season due to a long season this year. Rich in nutrients and antioxidants.
data.description: MISSION, Kan., July 24, 2025 - The extended sweet cherry season in 2025 has ensured an abundance of fresh sweet cherries in stores during the back-to-school period. These nutrient-rich superfruits, known for their antioxidants, will be readily available for purchase, offering a healthy option for consumers.

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets.com's report highlights Middle East and North Africa renewable energy market analysis, focusing on 2025-2030 growth with Saudi Arabia, UAE as top emerging markets.
data.description: The research report "Renewable Energy Regional Analysis Market: Middle East and North Africa" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Focusing on the period from 2025 to 2030 with 2024 as the base year, this analysis delves into the MENA region's renewable energy market. The report offers insights into the market's compound annual growth rates (CAGR) and provides a detailed examination of the renewable energy sector in the Middle East and North Africa.

data.title: ServiceNow exceeds expectations in Q2, reports $3.22B revenue, $4.09 EPS. Raises full-year outlook. Stock up 3.7% to $991.49.
data.description: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE: NOW) exceeded expectations in their second-quarter financial report, with revenue reaching around $3.22 billion, surpassing the anticipated $3.12 billion. The company also outperformed in adjusted earnings, coming in at $4.09 per share compared to the estimated $3.57 per share by analysts. ServiceNow's chairman and CEO, Bill McDermott, highlighted the significance of the ServiceNow AI Platform in their success, mentioning that businesses across industries are adapting for agentic AI. Looking ahead, ServiceNow projects third-quarter subscription revenue between $3.26 billion and $3.265 billion. Additionally, the full-year subscription revenue forecast has been raised to $12.775 billion to $12.795 billion, up from the previous guidance of $12.64 billion to $12.68 billion. Following the report, ServiceNow's shares experienced a 3.7% increase, with trading at $991.49 on Thursday. Visit a financial news platform for the complete article.

data.title: Litecoin (LTC) remains steady above $113 with -1.45% daily drop. Bullish momentum indicated despite pullback, resistance at $122.
data.description: The price of LTC is currently at $113.03, experiencing a daily decrease of 1.45%. Despite this decline, technical analysis suggests a bullish trend, highlighting a potential upward momentum. The key resistance level to watch for is at $122.

data.title: Cascade Space secures $5.9M seed funding for space communication platform, backed by various investors.
data.description: A technology company based in San Francisco called Cascade Space has revealed that it recently secured $5.9 million in seed funding. The investment round saw contributions from a variety of firms, including Nova Threshold, Undeterred Capital, Y Combinator, Night Capital, Olive Capital, Valkyrie Ventures, Karman Ventures, Palm Drive Capital, Garage Capital, TRAC, Aurelia Foundry, Hawktail, MGV.VC, Pioneer Fund, Liquid 2 Ventures, among others. This funding will be utilized to advance the company's end-to-end communication system design, test, and operation platform.

data.title: Elation survey: 39.3% of primary care physicians use AI for daily clinical documentation.
data.description: In San Francisco, Elation Health, a leading clinical technology company in primary care, disclosed findings from a recent survey of 291 primary care physicians regarding the incorporation of Artificial Intelligence (AI). The survey highlighted adoption rates, concerns, insights, and user requests surrounding AI integration in primary care. Results showed that 39.3% of physicians are currently utilizing AI in their workflows.

data.title: Lagunitas seeks "Party Legend" to combat party decline with beer, statue, $5K reward. Event attendance down 35% since 2004.
data.description: Amidst a decline in party culture, Lagunitas is set to celebrate those who continue to embrace it by introducing a new beer named after them. The company also plans to erect a statue in their honor and award $5,000 to help sustain the festivities. Based in PETALUMA, Calif., this move comes in light of a 35% decrease in social gatherings since 2004.
